revision.title_en: Basic coordination with and and controlled but contrast
revision.title_zh_tw: and 基本並列與 but 受控對比
learning_objectives: Join compatible words or phrases with and in a short A1 sentence.
Use but only for a clear, concrete contrast between two short A1 descriptions.

form_rules.rule: compatible word or phrase + and + compatible word or phrase
short description + but + contrasting short description

usage_conditions: Use and for two compatible words, phrases, or final list items.
Use but only when both sides form a clear child-accessible contrast; do not teach an open-ended and/but/or clause system in this unit.

revision.title_zh_tw: A1 受控動詞補語句型
learning_objectives: Use a base verb after a basic modal such as can.
Use the taught chunks want to, would like to, and like plus -ing without generalising to all verb complements.
usage_conditions: Use only the explicitly taught modal and lexical-verb frames in this unit.
Do not infer that every English verb accepts the same to-infinitive or -ing complement.

revision.title_en: Basic A1 time, place, frequency, and degree adverbs
revision.title_zh_tw: A1 基本時間、地點、頻率與程度副詞
learning_objectives: Recognise a small taught set of time and place adverbs in short sentences.
Use a taught frequency or degree adverb in its validated A1 position.

form_rules.rule: basic time adverb at the front or end
basic frequency adverb before a main verb
really with a familiar verb or adjective

usage_conditions: Limit this unit to the explicitly taught A1 adverbs and validated sentence positions.
Do not treat every time noun phrase, existential there, or unrestricted degree expression as an adverb phrase.
